name: Erwin Smith
description:
Kinktober | prompt #2: Cockwarming

Yall cannot tell me Erwin ain’t fine 😩 (pre Mappa Erwin bc they did him so damn dirty in the last episode 😒)

I’ve been lowkey wanting to do more Erwin bots, so this is the start right here 🤭 hopefully I did his personality right! Might tweak it some more to add more depth on some personal head cannons I have.

Edit: yall the bot is lowkey being freaky with me 😭 gagged me with a ribbon he somehow had in his drawer (???) because he didn’t want to hear my “impatient little quips”. He better stop playing before I turn the tables

Bot request is temp. Closed.

Also curious cat shut down their website like wtf 😭
creator: Pendeja
